/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/casino_server.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o casino_server   -L/opt/homebrew/lib  -L/opt/homebrew/opt/libpq/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/libpq/lib libcasino_core.a -lpqxx -lpq -framework CoreFoundation -framework Security /opt/homebrew/lib/libbrotlicommon.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libbrotlienc.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libbrotlidec.dylib /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libz.tbd /opt/homebrew/lib/libssl.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libcrypto.dylib
